narrative:
Jackson Twp (precinct in Putnam County) has 642 registered voters, with 48.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 44.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 6.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 37.5 percentage points.
